intro:
Arunachal Pradesh — the Land of the Rising Sun — is India's easternmost and most biodiverse state, with Itanagar as its capital. ShiftIndia connects you with 432+ verified movers in Itanagar, serving government employees, NGO workers and private residents across the state's accessible urban centres.

From Itanagar's Naharlagun township and capital complex areas to inter-state moves via Assam, our KYC-verified vendors understand the inner-line permit logistics and mountain terrain of India's northeastern frontier.
whyUs: Arunachal Pradesh's inner-line permit requirements, limited road infrastructure and the Siang, Subansiri and Brahmaputra tributaries' flood risks demand experienced Northeast specialists. Our vendors carry ₹5 lakh damage coverage and GPS tracking on all moves.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Arunachal Pradesh?
faqs.a: Local moves within Itanagar start at ₹5,500. Itanagar to Guwahati inter-state moves (200 km) typically cost ₹9,000–₹15,000 including packing.

faqs.q: Which areas in Arunachal Pradesh does ShiftIndia cover?
faqs.a: We cover Itanagar and Naharlagun. For other district towns (Pasighat, Tawang, Ziro), additional lead time and routing through Assam is required.

faqs.q: Do you handle inner-line permit requirements for Arunachal moves?
faqs.a: Our vendors advise on ILP documentation requirements for entering and operating in Arunachal Pradesh and can guide you through the process.

faqs.q: Can you handle moves from Arunachal to Assam or mainland India?
faqs.a: Yes. All long-distance moves from Arunachal are routed via Guwahati to any Indian destination, with GPS tracking and transit insurance.
